queries.query: books published by the Aldine Press
materials about Ethiopia or Ethiopian Jews
curated selection for Hebrew printing exhibit
books printed by Bragadin press in Venice
books printed by Bragadin press in Venice
curated selection for Hebrew printing exhibit

queries.curl: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"books printed by Bragadin press in Venice"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Hebrew books printed in Amsterdam between 1620 and 1650"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"books published by the Aldine Press"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"incunabula in the collection (books printed before 1500)"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"books printed in Constantinople"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"works by Johann Buxtorf"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"works by Moses Mendelssohn"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"works by Maimonides"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"works by Josephus Flavius"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"books on Jewish philosophy"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"books from the Napoleonic era 1795-1815"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"materials about Ethiopia or Ethiopian Jews"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"books about book collecting or bibliography"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"chronological distribution of the collection"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"major Hebrew printing centers represented"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"biblical commentaries"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Hebrew grammar books"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Talmud editions"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"works by Joseph Karo"}'
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"curated selection for Hebrew printing exhibit"}'

scoringProcedure: 1. Run each curl command with server running
2. Score 5 dimensions (0-5 each): Accuracy, Richness, CrossRef, Narrative, Pedagogical

metrics.measurement: Average of 20 Q scores (each 0-25) via historian rubric
Record count per query after E1
pytest tests/ exit code 0 after each E

gates.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"works by Johann Buxtorf"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;r=json.load(sys.stdin);print(r['response']['candidate_set']['count']);assert r['response']['candidate_set']['count']>=5"

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"works by Moses Mendelssohn"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;r=json.load(sys.stdin);print(r['response']['candidate_set']['count']);assert r['response']['candidate_set']['count']>=5"

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"works by Maimonides"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;r=json.load(sys.stdin);print(r['response']['candidate_set']['count']);assert r['response']['candidate_set']['count']>=15"

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"works by Joseph Karo"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;r=json.load(sys.stdin);print(r['response']['candidate_set']['count']);assert r['response']['candidate_set']['count']>=3"

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"chronological distribution of the collection"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;r=json.load(sys.stdin);assert r['response'].get('metadata',{}).get('data',{}).get('field')=='date_decade'"

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"major Hebrew printing centers represented"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;r=json.load(sys.stdin);assert r['response'].get('metadata',{}).get('data',{}).get('field')=='place'"

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"curated selection for Hebrew printing exhibit"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;r=json.load(sys.stdin);m=r['response']['message'].lower();assert 'curated' in m or 'selection' in m or 'exhibit' in m"

gates.criterion: Narrative works when no connections exist
Same candidate same score, no API calls
Top-3-by-score same place; select_diverse picks >=2 places
Header, items, significance notes, coverage summary

gates.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"curated selection for Hebrew printing exhibit"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;r=json.load(sys.stdin);items=r['response']['message'].lower().count('item ');print(f'Items:{items}');assert items>=5"

regressionTests.query: Q1: books printed by Bragadin press in Venice
riskFactors: E3 comparison changes must not break publisher+place filter
E4 thematic context must not displace existing narrative

regressionTests.query: Q2: Hebrew books printed in Amsterdam 1620-1650
riskFactors: E3 cross-reference integration could slow response
Multi-filter query (place+language+date) sensitive to adapter changes
E2 analytical routing must not misclassify as analytical
Date RANGE filter must keep working after E1 adapter changes
Subject CONTAINS filter unaffected by E1 but narrative agent changes in E3/E4 could regress richness
Subject filter stability; E3 narrative additions must not overflow response
Subject filter unchanged but formatter changes in E3/E4 could affect output
E4 pedagogical framing must enhance not replace existing narrative
Highest-scoring query; E3 cross-reference must not slow it; E1 Buxtorf alias should help not hurt
E4 thematic context for Talmud printing must enhance not replace

gates.command: Run 20 queries via evaluation procedure; min score >= 1
curl -s http://localhost:8000/health | python3 -c "import sys,json;r=json.load(sys.stdin);assert r['status']=='healthy' and r['database_connected']"
python -m app.cli query 'books printed in Paris' --db data/index/bibliographic.db 2>&1 | head -5
git diff --cached --name-only | xargs grep -l 'sk-' 2>/dev/null || echo clean
gates.criterion: No API keys in tracked files
